mapper.update: update course set view_count = view_count + 1 where id = #{id}
update course set collect_count = collect_count + 1 where id = #{id}
update course set collect_count = collect_count - 1 where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select c.* from course c join collection col on c.id = col.target_id where col.user_id = #{userId} and col.target_type = 'course' order by col.createtime desc
mapper.insert: insert into course (title, description, type, level, scenario, cover, video_url, content, view_count, collect_count, createtime, updatetime) values (#{title}, #{description}, #{type}, #{level}, #{scenario}, #{cover}, #{videoUrl}, #{content}, 0, 0, now(), now())
mapper.update: update course set title = #{title}, description = #{description}, type = #{type}, level = #{level}, scenario = #{scenario}, cover = #{cover}, video_url = #{videoUrl}, content = #{content}, updatetime = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select type as name, count(*) as value from course group by type
select id, title, type, level, view_count as viewCount, collect_count as collectCount from course order by id desc
